original_title: NGOD-131 Reiwa Japan Shame NTR Collection A Shut-In Stepson (28 Years Old) And His Excessively Kind Stepmom (50 Years Old) Chisato Shoda - play Chisato
overview: Chisato (50), a kind-hearted chaste mother, was secretly worried about her son (28), who has been living in her room like a hikikomori for nearly a decade. A mother who wishes for her child's independence and continues to speak gentle words today. "Don't panic, Masaki-chan ... I'm sure you'll find a good job ..." However, the kindness of her mother triggered the forbidden incest fall drama of Yomoya, at which time the family No one knew it.
